caption: A screen recording displays a web browser open to a page titled "blackboard shell learning," featuring a dark-themed conceptual map. The map consists of interconnected nodes, including a central image of a red organ, possibly a kidney, and several circular icons containing text and graphics. Legible text on some nodes includes "Learning," "Insights," and "Insights -> Introduction -> Kumu." A small video overlay in the top right corner shows a man with light skin and short hair wearing a dark shirt and black headphones, looking toward the camera. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in his video window, and the content of the conceptual map stays static. The browser's tab bar shows multiple open tabs, including "Trial & Learning by Synthesis," "Frameworks by SynthesisWiki," and "Future of Society by SynthesisWiki." The overall scene depicts a remote learning or presentation environment.
